response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of software development experience but only ~6 months of professional C++ exposure (National Instruments, 2014-2015) and a university thesis project. Their career trajectory is firmly in web/full-stack development with TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. No evidence of message brokers, MQTT, IEC 62443, industrial automation, or the secure embedded/industrial domain this role demands. C++ is not even listed in their skills section.
strengths: 15+ years of overall software engineering experience with strong craftsmanship/TDD culture
Some low-latency, multi-threaded, async I/O background (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic with DLang)
Demonstrated mentoring, workshops, and technical communication ability
concerns: Negligible recent C++ experience; no STL/modern C++ work shown in last decade
No exposure to industrial automation, IEC 62443, MQTT, or relevant OT protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, DNP 3.0)
No message-broker or event-driven large-scale architecture work explicitly demonstrated

key_factors.factor: Lack of C++ depth and recency
No industrial automation / IEC 62443 / SDL background
Strong general engineering tenure and mentoring track record
